elements.description: Circled numeral '4' marking a vertical post/member at the eave edge, below the roof slope
Vertical dimension '0.30' shown beside the post at the fascia/soffit zone

warnings: This detail (R2) is referenced from the gridF-end eave on section รูปตัด 2 (หน้า10, 'เชิงชาย2 (R2) ดูแบบขยาย A-16') and shows an overhang measured from reference line gridF, matching the 1.50m north-overhang dimension confirmed on the roof plan (หน้า07).

This sheet (A-16) contains 3 distinct views: a first eave detail (R1, top-left) — see sibling _หน้า18_eave_r1.json, this eave detail (R2, bottom-left), and a steel sunshade lattice detail (top-right) — see sibling _หน้า18_sunshade_lattice.json.

R1 (carport/gridC-referenced) and R2 (gridF-referenced) share the identical fascia board material spec but differ in overall roof-slope geometry (R1 is at the low end of the monopitch, R2 at the high end) — consistent with the roof cross-sections on หน้า10.
